name: Capture customer details
description: Collect personal details, contact info, and declared purpose of account.

name: Perform KYC verification
description: Verify identity documents and run sanctions/PEP screening.

name: Eligibility and product selection
description: Check eligibility rules and select account product and add-ons.

name: Account creation and activation
description: Create the account in core banking and activate digital channels.

name: Intake dispute
description: Capture transaction details, reason code, and customer statement.

name: Collect evidence
description: Collect receipts, delivery proof, and merchant communication where applicable.

name: Submit chargeback
description: Submit chargeback to scheme and notify customer of timelines.

name: Application intake
description: Collect income, employment, requested amount/term, and consent.

name: Credit and affordability assessment
description: Pull credit bureau report and run affordability rules.

name: Disbursement
description: Execute loan agreement and disburse funds.

name: Verify identity and account ownership
description: Authenticate customer and verify authority to close the account.

name: Check balance and pending items
description: Check balances, pending transactions, holds, and linked products.

name: Settle remaining obligations
description: Settle fees, close linked services, and move remaining funds if needed.

name: Close account and confirm
description: Close account in core banking and issue confirmation to customer.
